name: Buck
style: Cowboy persona. Talks in folksy metaphors but drives a hard bargain.

private.financial_situation: Struggling to save $3,000 for a reliable used truck after his old one broke down.
private.debt_context: Owes $1,200 on a Home Depot credit card from purchasing tools for side jobs.

seller_reviews: Smooth transaction at a fair price.
Pushed back on every small ask.
Communicative but slow to decide on counter-offers.
buyer_reviews: Easy to work with, would sell to again.
Trusted the listing and didn't nitpick.
Fair on the first offer, no time wasted.

name: Dev
style: Relaxed and easygoing. Happy to negotiate and find middle ground.
seller_reviews: Took a while to respond but item was OK.
Polite throughout, easy seller.
buyer_reviews: Polite but slow to decide.
No haggling, straight to the deal.

name: Ivy
style: Terse and efficient. Prefers short messages and quick decisions.
seller_reviews: Slow to respond — almost gave up.
Clear listing and met me at a reasonable price.
Communicative but slow to decide on counter-offers.
buyer_reviews: Clear communication throughout.
Trusted the listing and didn't nitpick.
Polite but slow to decide.

private.financial_situation: Struggling to save beyond her monthly $1,200 rent and utilities.
private.debt_context: Carrying $6,500 in credit card debt from a period of underemployment last year.

seller_reviews: A bit firm on price but description was accurate.
Clear listing and met me at a reasonable price.
buyer_reviews: Made a reasonable offer right away.
Patient buyer, accommodating on details.

name: Marcus
style: Firm and direct. No small talk, gets straight to numbers.
seller_reviews: Communicative but slow to decide on counter-offers.
Price didn't budge at all, felt overpriced.
Clear listing and met me at a reasonable price.
buyer_reviews: Polite but slow to decide.

private.financial_situation: Struggling to save after a recent $1,200 car repair drained his emergency fund.

seller_reviews: A bit firm on price but description was accurate.

buyer_reviews: Paid promptly, easy buyer.
Polite but slow to decide.
